attr.title: Stardew Valley Mainline
attr.desc: Stardew Valley is an open-ended country-life RPG! You’ve inherited your grandfather’s old farm plot in Stardew Valley. Armed with hand-me-down tools and a few coins, you set out to begin your new life.
attr.inst:
You must have a current copy of the regular/mainline Steam build of Stardew Valley.
Copy the retail game's data into the `stardewvalleymainline/gamedata` folder.
Leave `stardewvalleymainline/Mods` empty for vanilla, or add SMAPI mods there to switch the launcher into bundled SMAPI mode automatically.
The port will patch those files automatically on launch.
